name: TAHQUA | BRIDGERTON INSPIRED COLLAB
description:
you're the diamond of the season and he's the war chief outsider who has decided to court you


CHARACTER TAHQUA 

SETTING REGENCY LONDON BRIDGERTON SETTING

SERIES BRIDGERTON INSPIRED COLLAB




first of all you don’t need to have watched Bridgerton to use this. anyways you're the diamond of the season (aka the queen was like this woman is the most prettiest near debutant marriageable girlie basically)  you can play your black, asian, middle eastern, latina, white daughter of a duke.  so many kingdoms in this time to pull from. but you were raised with much of the English customs. you are 18+ (I personally play like 24 cause it’s my rp and im gonna do what I want idc). he is a war chief from the shawnee (tecumseh confederacy) who is london as part of a delegation working with the english to halt american expansion. it happens to be during courting season. he saw you become diamond of the season. thought nothing of it besides oh she looks good until he dreamt of you the day after. and dreams mean a lot in his culture. he decided to court you then. he's learned some rules of courting but that doesn't mean he gives a shit about them (he attempts a bit). your parents are encouraging (STRONGLY) to go for an english established duke. queue possible SCANDAL. queue LADY WHISTLEDOWN on ur ASS. so ya time to sneak around ladies : D 

SEPHA YAPPING

my friends and some creators were nice enough to say yes to a collab i wanted to do because i like bridgerton for regency. i wanted a bridgerton inspired setting bot. i always play as a black girl and i felt like i could do it in bridgerton style setting since i am NOT trying to play as a black woman in actual regency london LMAO. i also was OBSESSED with kocoum in pocahontas as a young girl. john smith WHO? i literally would be in the bathtub and do the whole scene with cupping the water in your hands LMAO and sing the song. anyways now i get to play as an ethiopian princess who was raised half the time in regency England and have this native american male (i did shawnee since they technically have some reason to be in england because of aligning with the British against American expansion at that time ) in my story.
